captions_untagged.explicit: Taking a much-needed break from writing my art history thesis to just appreciate the details. There is something so perfectly dramatic about Trafalgar Square when the sky looks exactly like the bronze.
captions_untagged.moderate: Nothing beats a quiet Sunday afternoon wandering around the city. The dark metal against the pale stone under an overcast sky is entirely my favorite aesthetic.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Such an imposing profile from this angle. The way the dark mane stands out against the classical columns in the background under the grey sky is just stunning.
